patch.value: Decouple optional package actions from static SDK contracts

Move beads/todos import/export action exposure out of the always-on static SDK tool schema so optional package commands are advertised through runtime extension/package contracts only when installed, while preserving backwards-compatible availability diagnostics.

Static SDK core actions no longer imply optional first-party package commands are always core; installed package commands remain discoverable through runtime contracts; MCP/action availability parity is documented or tested; focused SDK/contracts/package tests pass.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate check before create: ran pm search 'SDK optional package actions beads todos public contracts' --limit 10. Results were closed contract/history items plus active pm-59gj; no open child tracked optional package action decoupling, so this follow-up is created under pm-59gj.
